column1: # The engine routes specific-value dispatch through a per-signature
# `patterns` map keyed by arg position. A concrete-scalar pattern
# (Data != null on a numeric / string / boolean / atom) matches when
# the arg's Data equals the pattern's Data; if it doesn't, the sig is
# skipped and a less-specific overload (typically with no patterns) is
#            no patterns      → returns the arg unchanged (catch-all)

column3: non-zero falls through to catch-all → echoes the arg
1 fails the {0:0} pattern, catch-all returns 1 unchanged
string-literal pattern matches on Data equality
